title: Lesson 8: (Vocab) - こっち, そっち, あっち...

intro_cards.title: The Small っ (Sokuon)
intro_cards.body:
A small っ (called sokuon) doubles the consonant that follows it, creating a brief pause:

こっち (kocchi) — 'this way'
そっち (socchi) — 'that way'
あっち (acchi) — 'over there'

Notice that っ is written smaller than the regular つ. In romaji, the doubled consonant shows the pause: kocchi, not kochi.

items.gloss: that way (over there); that direction; over there; yonder
when; at what time; how soon
